verify: python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'.'); from scripts.memory.bridge import generate_implement_prompt; p = generate_implement_prompt(task_name='test', action='do thing', files=['a.py'], verify=['true'], memory_id='cn-abc123'); assert 'CRITICAL' in p and 'FIRST action' in p and 'LAST action' in p and 'Memory closed:' in p, f'Missing lifecycle instructions'"

echo '{"agent_id":"test","agent_type":"test","last_assistant_message":"Done. Memory closed: cn-abc123","cwd":"/tmp","session_id":"s1","agent_transcript_path":"/tmp/t.jsonl"}' | python3 scripts/hook-subagent-stop.py; echo "exit: $?"

python3 -c "import json; s=json.load(open('.claude/settings.json')); hooks=[h for e in s['hooks'].get('SubagentStop',[]) for h in e.get('hooks',[])]; assert any('hook-subagent-stop.py' in h.get('command','') for h in hooks), 'SubagentStop not registered'"

python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'.'); from scripts.memory.reconcile import reconcile_session; r = reconcile_session(type('P',(),{'__truediv__':lambda s,o:type('P',(),{'exists':lambda s:False})(),'resolve':lambda s:s})()); assert isinstance(r, dict) and 'reconciled' in r"

python3 -c "import json; s=json.load(open('.claude/settings.json')); hooks=[h for e in s['hooks'].get('PreCompact',[]) for h in e.get('hooks',[])]; assert any('hook-pre-compact.py' in h.get('command','') for h in hooks), 'PreCompact not registered'"
